recommendations.title: Nomadland
recommendations.overview: A woman in her sixties embarks on a journey through the western United States after losing everything in the Great Recession, living as a van-dwelling modern-day nomad.

recommendations.title: Hamnet
recommendations.overview: The powerful story of love and loss that inspired the creation of Shakespeare's timeless masterpiece, Hamlet.

recommendations.title: Eternals
recommendations.overview: The Eternals are a team of ancient aliens who have been living on Earth in secret for thousands of years. When an unexpected tragedy forces them out of the shadows, they are forced to reunite against mankind’s most ancient enemy, the Deviants.

recommendations.title: Songs My Brothers Taught Me
recommendations.overview: This complex portrait of modern-day life on the Pine Ridge Indian Reservation explores the bond between a brother and his younger sister, who find themselves on separate paths to rediscovering the meaning of home.

recommendations.title: Cry Macho
recommendations.overview: A one-time rodeo star and washed-up horse breeder takes a job from an ex-boss to bring the man's young son home from Mexico.

recommendations.title: The Cowboy Way
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Crime, Drama, Thriller, Western
recommendations.overview: Two championship rodeo partners travel to New York to find their missing friend, Nacho Salazar who went missing there.

recommendations.title: A Very Brady Sequel
recommendations.overview: A man claiming to be Carol Brady's long-lost first husband, Roy Martin, shows up at the suburban Brady residence one evening. An impostor, the man is actually determined to steal the Bradys' familiar horse statue, a $20-million ancient Asian artifact

recommendations.title: The Boy, the Mole, the Fox and the Horse
recommendations.overview: The unlikely friendship of a boy, a mole, a fox and a horse traveling together in the boy's search for home.

recommendations.title: Sweet Virginia
recommendations.overview: A former rodeo star, now a motel manager, meets a young man who is responsible for the violence that suddenly has seized his small town.

recommendations.title: The Horse Whisperer
recommendations.overview: The mother of a severely traumatized daughter enlists the aid of a unique horse trainer to help the girl's equally injured horse.
